steps.title: Read two boundary points from the graph
steps.content: The shaded region's boundary is $rx+ty=-77$. The line crosses the axes at $(-11,0)$ and $(0,-7)$. Enter $x_1=[-11,0]$, $y_1=[0,-7]$, and run the custom regression $r x_1+t y_1\sim -77$ in Desmos.

steps.title: Compute r + t
steps.content: Desmos gives $r=7$ and $t=11$. Therefore $r+t=7+11=18$. That matches choice A.
